metadata.description: Directory-submission and product-marketing skills customized for CNA / healthcare training sites and local business listings. Forked from coreyhaines31/marketingskills (MIT).

plugins.name: marketing-skills
plugins.description: Two skills: directory-submissions (local/education/healthcare directory strategy — Google Business Profile, review platforms, education & CNA aggregators, local citations, backlinks, GEO) and product-marketing (the shared product-context document all skills read first).
